items.summary: Update `frontend/src/components/CuisineSection.tsx` to render the newly generated images for Chepala Pulusu, Prawns Biriyani, and Natu Kodi Kura. Map each dish name to its corresponding image filename in `/assets/generated/` and display it as the card banner image. Maintain the existing South Indian theme styling (terracotta, gold, teal palette, Playfair Display / Lato fonts) and keep the emoji fallback for any dish without a generated image.
